skill1.kitLine: ■ Activates when performing a Full Charge attack. Affects all allies.
skill1.note: Trigger approximated as shotFired rather than explicit full-charge; faithful for an SR in auto-play where every shot is a full charge. Block materialized from the offline parser (blablalink prose), NOT hand-verified per note.
Value/duration faithful, but Prika herself cannot benefit (no hasPierce config — see caveat 2 / F1).

skill1.kitLine: ATK ▲ 20% of the skill user's ATK for 3 sec.
skill1.note: casterAtkPct = 'skill user's ATK' framing per re-materialized parser; faithful.

skill1.kitLine: ■ Activates only while in Performance status. Affects self. (Performance sub-block trigger)
skill1.note: Skipped per note: sub-block is heal-potency + Gains Pierce, both defensive/inert. Performance status itself is untracked.
Heal-potency buff; inert for DPS, skipped as defensive.

skill1.kitLine: Gains Pierce. This effect is continuous.
skill1.note: Listed unmodeled AND no hasPierce tag carried — root of caveat 2 / F1 (strongest COLD hypothesis).

skill2.kitLine: ■ Activates when entering Full Burst. Affects self. Max HP ▲ 19.98% for 10 sec.
skill2.note: Defensive HP buff, skipped per note.

skill2.kitLine: ■ Activates when Sing Along takes effect while Prika is in Performance status. (Encore trigger)
skill2.where: skill2 solo trigger fullBurstEnter; duet trigger burstCast
skill2.note: Sing Along/Performance is an untracked partner mechanic, proxied to fire once per Full Burst entry (solo) / per burstCast (duet). Documented approximation — see caveat 1 and note UNCERTAIN.

skill2.kitLine: Encore — Function: Extends the duration of Performance for Prika and strengthens allies.
skill2.where: operational 'strengthens allies' half = Effect 3 block(s) below
skill2.note: The 'strengthens allies' half is Effect 3 (modeled). The 'extends Performance duration' half is Effect 2 (UNMODELED). Performance state itself represented via modes config (see burst header).

skill2.kitLine: Effect 1: Affects the member who initiated Sing Along. Assigned Part: Singing. continuous and cannot be removed.
skill2.note: Part assignment is inert for DPS, skipped.

skill2.kitLine: Effect 2: Affects all allies. Performance duration ▲ 21 sec.
skill2.note: Performance is an untracked status. Under-credits Charge Damage uptime in solo (25s vs ~46s) — F5, COLD.

skill2.kitLine: Effect 3: Affects all allies. Attack Damage ▲ 25.01% for 10 sec.
skill2.where: skill2 solo fullBurstEnter attackDamagePct 25.01/10s; duet burstCast attackDamagePct 25.01/9999
skill2.note: Value faithful; duet makes it permanent. Solo cadence is the proxied Sing Along approximation (caveat 1).

skill2.kitLine: Effect 4: Affects self. Cooldown of Burst Skill ▲ 21 sec.
skill2.where: skill2 solo burstCast burstCdr -21; duet burstCast burstCdr -9999
skill2.note: Note documents intent as a +21s cooldown INCREASE (the penalty for Performance extension); block encodes burstCdr -21. Sign convention not independently verified here; F3 flags possible solo over-penalty (COLD).

burst.kitLine: ■ Affects all allies. Performance — Function: Strengthens allies and restores HP.
burst.note: The Performance status (untracked mechanic) is represented indirectly via the solo/duet mode split + burstFirst ordering. 'Strengthens allies' = Effect 2 (modeled block); 'restores HP' = Effect 1 (UNMODELED).

burst.kitLine: Effect 1: Restores 3.04% of the skill user's final max HP as HP every 1 sec for 25 sec. cannot be removed.
burst.note: Heal not emitted as recovery events; inert for Prika DPS but blocks 'when recovery takes effect' consumer procs (Crown-type).

burst.kitLine: Effect 2: Charge Damage ▲ 25% for 25 sec. cannot be removed.
burst.where: burst solo burstCast chargeDamagePct 25/25s; duet burstCast chargeDamagePct 25/9999
burst.note: Value/duration faithful; duet makes it permanent. Solo uptime under-credited when Encore would extend Performance (caveat 4 / F5).

documentedConfounds.text: Encore proxy: solo mode fires Encore on EVERY Full Burst entry even with no Sing Along caster, over-crediting ally Attack Damage ▲ 25.01% AND over-applying self Burst-cooldown ▲ 21s.
documentedConfounds.why: Over-crediting the team Attack Damage buff pushes sim HIGH (HOT). The coupled CD over-penalty is a COLD counter-force (see F3). Net documented direction is HOT over-credit, which would MASK the observed COLD board (0.691) — i.e. the true COLD shortfall is larger than it appears.

documentedConfounds.text: No hasPierce tag: Prika's continuous Performance Pierce is absent, so her own Pierce Damage ▲ 13.09% and partner Pierce buffs do not land on her (held pending popup measurement, probe-runs 2026-07-14).
documentedConfounds.why: Missing Pierce under-credits her damage → sim too low. This is finding F1, the STRONGEST COLD hypothesis (alice precedent +16-33%), and directly matches the 0.691 COLD board.

documentedConfounds.text: Burst Performance heal (3.04% caster max HP/s, 25s) not emitted as recovery events — 'when recovery takes effect' consumers (Crown-type) won't proc off Prika.
documentedConfounds.why: Inert for Prika's own DPS. Only a team-level COLD risk in comps with recovery consumers; the board comp (PA MiKa, boss Iron) has none, so it does not explain this record.

documentedConfounds.text: Encore 'Performance duration ▲ 21 sec' unmodeled — solo Charge Damage ▲ 25% (and heal) run 25s instead of an extended ~46s when Encore fires.
documentedConfounds.why: Under-credited Charge Damage buff uptime → sim too low. Finding F5 (Performance-duration under-credit), consistent with the COLD board.

documentedConfounds.text: F3: solo-Encore CD over-penalty — the self Burst-cooldown ▲ 21s (burstCdr -21) may over-penalize her burst cadence in solo.
documentedConfounds.why: If the +21s cooldown increase is over-applied, Prika bursts less often → under-prediction (COLD). Sign/cadence of burstCdr -21 not independently verified here; a candidate contributor to the COLD gap alongside F1/F5.

documentedConfounds.text: UNCERTAIN: the once-per-full-burst cadence for the team Attack Damage buff is an approximation of the real Sing Along trigger.
documentedConfounds.why: Same root as caveat 1 — in non-Sing-Along teams the proxy over-fires the Attack Damage buff (HOT). Folded here as the note's explicit open measurement; does not explain the COLD board.

authorIntentSummary: The author modeled only Prika's damage-relevant buffs: S1 full-charge team Projectile Explosion 20% / Pierce Damage 13.09% / ATK 20%-of-caster for 3s (materialized from the offline parser, not hand-verified), S2 Encore's ally Attack Damage 25.01%/10s (proxied onto Full Burst entry in solo, permanent in duet) plus the self Burst-cooldown +21s penalty, and the burst Charge Damage 25%/25s (permanent in duet). Defensive/inert effects — heal potency, Gains Pierce, Max HP, the burst HP regen, Singing part assignment, and the Performance-duration extension — are deliberately listed unmodeled, and two modes (solo / duet w/ Mint) plus a burstFirst block handle the untracked Sing Along↔Performance interaction. Known-not-faithful spots per the note and caveats: the missing hasPierce tag (strongest COLD hypothesis, F1), the Sing Along trigger proxy that over-credits in non-Sing-Along teams, the unmodeled Performance-duration extension that under-credits Charge Damage uptime (F5), and the unverified CD-penalty sign/cadence (F3).
